summary: Frontend-only testing of Coding Intelligence feature additions. All 9 required features verified and working correctly: Hero section shows Coding Intelligence pill with purple border (#c084fc), Navigation Products dropdown includes Coding Intelligence, FeaturesCoding section displays with '03 / Coding Intelligence' header and 6 purple-themed feature cards, Landing page Pricing Combined plan shows 'Market + Tuning + Coding' at €349/Monat with Coding features, Dashboard /dashboard/pakete Combined plan shows all Coding features, Coding Intelligence addon exists with 'Neu' badge at +€49/Mo, Comparison table includes 'Coding Zugang' and 'Coding-Datenbank' rows, Sidebar logo subtitle shows 'Market + Tuning + Coding', Navigation logo 'automotive' text animates between 3 brand colors.
